'''Aiwha-3 Squad''' was a [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commando]] [[Squad/Legends|squad]] that served in the [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]] of the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic]] during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]]. In the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|opening battle]] of the war on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]] in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]], all members of the [[unit]], except the [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] [[Jez (clone commando)|Jez]], were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in action.

==Description==
In combat, Aiwha-3 Squad wore [[Katarn-class commando armor/Legends|''Katarn''-class commando armor]] customized with [[Color/Legends|colors]].<ref name="RC:TZ" />

==History==
[[File:Clone_Army_Charge.jpg|thumb|right|300px|Aiwha-3 Squad participated in the Battle of Geonosis (pictured).]]
Aiwha-3 Squad was a [[Squad/Legends|unit]] of [[Clone commando/Legends|clone commandos]] that served in the [[Grand Army of the Republic/Legends|Grand Army of the Republic's]] [[Special Operations Brigade/Legends|Special Operations Brigade]]. Consisting of four [[Clone trooper/Legends|clones]] of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorian]] [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]], the members of the squad were created on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Kamino/Legends|Kamino]] and trained by [[Sergeant/Legends|Sergeant]] [[Kal Skirata]], another Mandalorian. The [[unit]] shared its name with the [[Aiwha/Legends|Aiwha]],<ref name="RC:TZ" /> a flying creature found on Kamino.<ref name="Aiwha DB">{{DB|creature|aiwha|aiwha}}</ref> Aiwha-3 Squad served in the [[First Battle of Geonosis/Legends|opening battle]] of the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] on the planet [[Geonosis/Legends|Geonosis]]<ref name="RC:TZ" /> in [[22 BBY/Legends|22 BBY]].<ref name="TERC" /> During the battle, all [[Commando/Legends|commandos]] of the unit, except the [[Trooper/Legends|trooper]] [[Jez (clone commando)|Jez]], were [[Death/Legends|killed]] in action.<ref name="CSWE Jez" /> Five [[Standard day/Legends|days]] after the fragmentation of the squad, Jez was sent to the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic's]] [[Capital/Legends|capital]] world of [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. There, the commando took part in a stand-off at the [[Arca Company Barracks]] when the six [[Null-class Advanced Recon Commando]]s—an elite cadre of [[Cloning/Legends|clone]] [[Troop/Legends|troopers]]—took control of the complex. Jez's [[Cuy'val Dar|training sergeant]], Kal Skirata, was able to resolve the situation peacefully, but he was heartbroken about the casualties sustained by Aiwha-3 and other squads on Geonosis.<ref name="RC:TZ" />

==Behind the scenes==
Aiwha-3 Squad was first mentioned in the [[2006]] novel ''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'', written by [[Karen Traviss]].<ref name="RC:TZ" />

==Appearances==
*''[[Republic Commando: Triple Zero]]'' {{1stm}}
